'''Rogue Wing''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was renamed "Rogue Wing" by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] (presumably after his [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]), who was placed in command of the wing by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] for his actions at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. The unit fought at the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]], where it suffered only light casualties due to being carried in the ''[[Emancipator]]''.
